narrative:
Perrysburg Twp North (precinct in Wood County) has 908 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
